import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { productAPI, categoryAPI, blogAPI } from '../utils/api'; import ProductCard from '../components/products/ProductCard'; import Spinner from '../components/common/Spinner'; import './Home.css'; export default function Home() { const [featured, setFeatured] = useState([]); const [categories, setCategories] = useState([]); const [blogs, setBlogs] = useState([]); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); useEffect(() => { Promise.all([productAPI.getFeatured(), categoryAPI.getAll(), blogAPI.getAll()]) .then(([p, c, b]) => { setFeatured(p.data.products); setCategories(c.data.categories); setBlogs(b.data.blogs.slice(0, 3)); }) .catch(() => {}) .finally(() => setLoading(false)); }, []); const stats = [ { icon: '🌾', value: '10,000+', label: 'Products Available' }, { icon: '🏪', value: '500+', label: 'Verified Sellers' }, { icon: '👨‍🌾', value: '200+', label: 'Expert Agronomists' }, { icon: '🚜', value: '50,000+', label: 'Happy Farmers' }, ]; const whyUs = [ { icon: '🔬', title: 'AI Crop Diagnosis', desc: 'Upload a photo of your crop and get instant disease detection with product recommendations.' }, { icon: '🌦️', title: 'Weather Recommendations', desc: 'Get product suggestions based on current weather and humidity conditions in your area.' }, { icon: '👨‍🏫', title: 'Expert Consultation', desc: 'Book one-on-one sessions with certified agronomists for personalized advice.' }, { icon: '⚡', title: 'Fast Delivery', desc: 'Same-day and next-day delivery available across major cities in Pakistan.' }, ]; return (
